extracted.title: TPGS Storage Conditions for 1/23/2026
extracted.description:
The following restrictions will be in place on the Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) system for Gas Day January 23, 2026:

Tres Palacios has restricted and sealed authorized withdrawal overrun nominations. No increases to authorized withdrawal overrun nominations will be allowed.

Tres Palacios has restricted and sealed withdrawal nominations and IWS activity at meter 45301 - TEXAS EASTERN (TPGS1120B). No increases in withdrawals or IWS activity will be accepted to meter 45301 - TEXAS EASTERN (TPGS1120B) except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
